name: Green Beans with Fried Bean Curd
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the drained tofu into small cubes.
2. Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a wok and fry the tofu until it turns golden. Remove and marinate in soy sauce and sherry.
3. Cut beans into pieces that are about 2 inches long.
4. Heat the remaining oil and stir-fry the beans for 1 minute. Sprinkle with salt.
5. Add the tofu and marinade.
6. Dissolve cornflour in water and stir into the rest of the ingredients.
7. Cook gently until the sauce thickens.
8. Serve hot over rice.
